comparison_context: The blind baseline was created before literature outcomes were added. It identified interface and integration uncertainty but produced no numerical membrane-bow prediction.
decision_impact: The baseline cannot be quantitatively compared with the 58 um measured result because it did not produce a bow prediction. The missing prediction demonstrates that thermomechanical and process-fixture reasoning are not represented sufficiently in the current deterministic rules.

prediction.model_name: Diamond Thermal Lab OS deterministic triage and Decision Board

review_notes: Do not fabricate a prediction value. This draft record intentionally preserves the missing quantitative prediction as a Gold Case capability gap.
